violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sanitizer in dishwasher found at 0ppm Chlorine. *The chemical seems to dispense fine, however, the sanitizer chemical (dated 2019) does not appear to be good. -Used test strip directly in chemical and found it at ~200ppm Chlorine. *Will have to manually sanitize dishes until corrected.
